entry.title: Output type WCOCO
entry.content:
Hi all, 

the requirement of my client is that when It is saved from WCOCO a condition contract for sales rebates It should be triggered an output print with the detail of all the data entered in the CCM both at header and Item level.

In WCOCO I don't see any option for the message determination, how can I trigger a print?

Thanks for your reply!

entry.title: Re: Down payment clearing Public Cloud
entry.content: Hello helpdesk, we are too searching for the possibility to clear the down payment through "create supplier invoice" app. Right now, we have to do a manual clearing after entering the invoice using the app "create supplier invoice". Thank for your help, Franziska

entry.title: Re: Delete the whole planning category in SAP S4/HANA Pub...
entry.content:
Dear @JanaHriv,

there is a check which prevents users from deleting plan categories which already contain data.
If you want to delete a category which is already in use, you need to delete the plan data first.

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Re: CR XI R2 Developer and Professional Edition
entry.content: from where we can download ?

entry.title: Re: Responsibility Management: Create Your Rules (5/5)
entry.content: @ArunK2 - Responsibility Management as of now doesn't support custom workflow.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM / Manage S/4H Cloud implementation for...
entry.content:
Hi Manuela,

it depends a bit on what you want to share across the companies. Are they using the different processes or are these separate or parallel roll outs of the same processes? 

e.g. you can have a scope (e.g. finance) which has country tags and you use the releases to roll it out to the different companies. For company specific documentation or test cases you can also use tags or naming conventions.

please also have a look into the best practice guide: https://support.sap.com/content/dam/support/en_us/library/ssp/alm/sap-cloud-alm-for-implementation/Implement-S4HANA-Cloud-Public-Edition.pdf

we can also have a chat on this: since.seidler@sap.com

Cheers

Since

entry.title: Re: Deep creation of Product via I_PRODUCTTP_2 does not work
entry.content:
Hi All,

via debugging of the exeption and the stack, startin with cm_cmd_prod_message->new and above I came to the solution.

It was as simple as:
CREATE BY \_productdescription
FIELDS ( productdescription language )
WITH VALUE #( ( %cid_ref = 'prd1'
                             Product = productid  "THIS LINE IS REALLY IMPORTANT
                             %target = VALUE #( ( %cid = 'prddescr1'
                                                                product = productid

Even if it works now, the call of the EML is really tricky.
Even if is syntactically correct, the successs of the command is absolutely not guaranteed.


Best regards 

Andreas

entry.title: Re: Filter Value help results in Child entity based on pa...
entry.content: Well I don't know you so don't really what you've tried either 😄 I've deployed this on production so works great for me. Like I said the one thing I can't do is have the value help accept parameters. As soon as that's done, my odata v4 RAP service is generatee for odata v4.01 which isn't supported by Fiori Elements. But as far as passing parent entity's fields into the value help of a child entity it works. Note that in my additional binding, the local element accesses the parent element through the association-to-parent. It works in both create, update and draft modes for me. I am on S/4HANA 2023 FPS02 On Premise.

entry.title: Re: Portuguese National Budget for 2025- Payroll Legal Changes
entry.content:
Hi Anabela,

I guess I already understood!

The percentage related to the year was aplied to the amount of income, and not to the amount of the exemption.

So in this case you have to compare the tax if it was normal IRS contribuition or IRS Jovem contribuition, right? We don't use the limit of 55 IAS. Correct?

In this case what should be the value of the wagetype IJOV?

Thanks,

Liliana Ferreira

entry.title: Re: SBOP BI Platform 4.3 SP04 Patch 10: Logon failed for...
entry.content:
There are many reasons for it

It could be the wrong configuration of the RESTful Access URL,

1 Check the access URL of the RESTful service under CMC-> Applications-> RESTful Web Services
2. If you use Load Balancer, check that you use the correct RESTful URL
3. Be aware that a self -signed certificate is no longer supported
4. TLS 1.3 is currently not supported and TLS 1.2 should be set to be used exclusively in Tomcat configuration

entry.title: Re: CALM & MS Teams Integration changes due to MS O365 co...
entry.content: Many thanks to Dirk (DiakSima) for giving me some further input on how to improve the graphic, and make it easier to read! Now the image uses different shapes to help visually contrast Workflows and Webhooks. The sequence in the image has also been updated so all 3 webhooks (I, II, and III) are grouped together vertically, instead of being split up like in the original image.

entry.title: Re: How to use I_ProductTP_2 in mock-framework?
entry.content:
Hi Andre,

if you want to use the entity for update you have to CREATE it first.
See an example for creation in https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/deep-creation-of-product-via-i-producttp-2-does-not-work/qaq-p/14002462#M4901394

The mixture of sql and cds mocking in AUnit is really tricky.

Have fun

Andreas

entry.title: what is service request for system refresh on sap portal
entry.content: Help me with the SR name for system refresh on sap portal, for system refresh activity on Rise project

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Cloud Integration Code search tool
entry.content:
Dear Fatima,

It’s always exciting to see open-source solutions that help streamline development processes—especially within the SAP ecosystem. The code examples and step-by-step guidance you provided offer invaluable insights for fellow developers looking to enhance their integration workflows. Kudos to you for sharing such a well-structured and helpful resource!

In Acorel, We have created a specialized tool to address the impending deprecation of the ${in.body} statement or any other mass changes. Specifically, our solution does not only automate the task of scanning but also creates backups, replaces outdated references with the new ${body} notation, redeploys flows, and provides a comprehensive report—all to ensure a safe and efficient transition. And this proved to be successful in some clients already.

It is great that all these tools or flows help clients to incorporate any changes smoothly, especially for the changes that has to be implemented in multiple scenarios!

Best regards,

Oguzhan

entry.title: 🇮🇳 Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA (Bangalore, India)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python. You do not need to have any background in the topic, but a lot of curiosity!

You'll become acquainted with how embedded Machine Learning in SAP HANA can be used to build ML models. In working through this CodeJam you'll also become familiar with how the SAP Business Application Studio can be used to work with Jupyter notebooks.

This is a free in-person event and is planned for Monday, March 10th in Bangalore, India from 09:00 to 16:00 IST. The language of the event and the content will be in English. The instructor is Developer Advocate Vitaliy Rudnytskiy from SAP.

Every attendee must complete essential prerequisites before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/hana-ml-py-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md.

The event is being hosted by Tata Consultancy Services. Thank you!

Location:

TCS Victor building; ITPL Main Rd, Pattandur Agrahara, Whitefield, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560066

Note that spaces are limited: we can only accommodate 35 attendees. If you want to attend, register by clicking the Yes button in the Will you be attending? section.

Visit the SAP CodeJam group for more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees.

entry.title: Re: RISE Migration with Tenant Copy Strategy
entry.content:
Thanks for the overview.
I always use and highly recommend a different user other than SYSTEM on source.
In this way, SYSTEM can stay locked and secured (as recommended by SAP.)

entry.title: IMAP connectivity test failure in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello, 

I'm trying to establish a connection between SAP CPI to Microsoft 365 with OAuth 2 credentials using Mail sender adapter, although my credentials are deployed successfully, when I'm trying to do the connectivity test, I'm getting (javax.mail.AuthenticationFailedException: AUTHENTICATE failed). 

Below are the screenshots attached for reference

Connectivity Test

 

Credentials deployed

I've given scope as:

https://outlook.office.com/IMAP.AccessAsUser.All 
https://outlook.office.com/SMTP.Send 

offline_access

 Am I missing something? Please help me out.

Thanks in advance

Shreyas

entry.title: Re: SBOP BI Platform 4.3 SP04 Patch 10: Logon failed for...
entry.content:
Many change between SP02 and SP04, so that many existing/new configurations should be adapted. For example, you can use the relative URL path for a RESTful URL

TLS 1.2 should be set exclusively in the Tomcat configuration (Tomcat use TLS 1.3 by default)

Another tip: After the upgrade, do not forget to remove the content of the Tomcat work directory.

entry.title: Re: How to show a busy indicator in story while the table...
entry.content: Thank you for your wonderful reply.

entry.title: Re: How to change the year in number ranges with nr status
entry.content: It means it already exists. Leave FBN1 and try again. NB: you may indicate the year 9999 to avoid creating an interval each year.

entry.title: Re: Siemens Team Center integration with SAP Signavio
entry.content:
Hi Ayse,
there are multiple options for connecting custom data with SAP Signavio Process Intelligence depending on the technology used by SIEMENS Team Center:

  • Ingestion API to push CSV-based data files 
  • depending on the data persistency of SIEMENS Teamcenter, you can use one of our connectors to connect directly to the database 
  • you can extract the data to a data warehouse/integration solution like SAP Datasphere, Snowflake and others
  • you can use a middleware like SAP Integration Suite to fetch data and push it to SAP Signavio Process Intelligence 

Best regards
Manuel

entry.title: Re: Integration between Cloud ALM and non-SAP architectur...
entry.content:
Hi Bruno,

Currently SAP Cloud ALM doesn't offer "out-of-the-box" integration with non-SAP deployment tools. If you want to request that kind of "out-of-the-box" integration, please create a request in the SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation Customer Influence Campaign.

However, hypothetically it may be possible to have a kind of very simple integration (triggering deployments) by leveraging the functionality of SAP Cloud ALM External API Management.

Our product offers a Resource Changes API for Features. SAP Cloud ALM generates an "event" each time a feature is created, updated, or deleted. The "event" includes a payload with data from the Feature. This includes the status of the Feature. If the non-SAP deployment tool has its own API for triggering deployments, it may be possible to set up an integration so that the tool triggers a deployment activity. For example, a Feature reaches status "Ready for Production", the event is generated and the external API for the non-SAP deployment tool is called to trigger some deployment activity.

However, this approach would be very restricted. The API currently does not provide a means for the Feature to receive data about any actions taken externally. So you would not be able to programmatically have deployment artifact IDs in the Feature, or see the status of the actual deployment. You would also need to try and find a way to identify the correct artifact to deploy for the Feature. This may be possible if the artifact has some kind of ID from the Feature (e.g. the artifact ID is the same as the Feature "externalId" (e.g. "5-539", etc.). Or you could leverage some kind of middleware to perform pre-processing before the request reaches the non-SAP deployment tool. But if not, this hypothesis may not work at all. 

If you would prefer a less effort intensive alternative to my hypothesis, then creating a request in the Customer Influence campaign is the best way to proceed. 

Thanks and regards, 
John

entry.title: How to filter a bar graph by dimensions from the dropdown option via scripting?
entry.content:
Hi,

Here is the scenario. I have created a bar graph and user wants to filter this graph by either of the three dimension (Brand, Region, Company Code). I know we can create a standard dimension input control which will serve this requirement but due to some constraint I cannot use the dimension input control. Is there a way, I can create a dropdown and filter the bar graph using the values from this dropdown via scripting. I'm looking at other places also but mostly people are using the dropdown to filter by measures instead of dimension.

Anyone who has faced this similar issue or knows the workaround in this scenario. Their comments would be deeply appreciated.

entry.title: How to read table data associated with archive object CRM_IBASE?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

    I am trying to archive ibase related data in Sap CRM.

    For this I have used the archive object CRM_IBASE.

    This archive object has many tables like IBIB, IBIB, IBST etc,

    I have used tocode SARA to archive one ibase data. It successfully completed with green color satus and delete completed. 

    However if I search for my ibase archived data in the ZARIXCR29 table i don't find my data. Why is this so? My requirement is to read the archived data and put that into a excel file.

For this i have used the code as below:

SELECT SINGLE * FROM admi_files INTO wa_admi_files WHERE document = docn.

SELECT * FROM zarixcr29 INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_archivekeys
             WHERE archivekey = wa_admi_files-archiv_key.

LOOP AT lt_archivekeys INTO la_archivekeys.

*Read information from archive
  CALL FUNCTION 'ARCHIVE_READ_OBJECT'
    EXPORTING
      object         = arobj  "'CRM_IBASE' 
      archivkey      = la_archivekeys-archivekey
      offset         = la_archivekeys-archiveofs
    IMPORTING
      archive_handle = ls_handle
    EXCEPTIONS
      OTHERS         = 1.

CALL FUNCTION 'ARCHIVE_GET_TABLE'
      EXPORTING
        archive_handle          = ls_handle
        record_structure        = 'IBIB' "'IBIB'
        all_records_of_object   = 'X'
        automatic_conversion    = 'X'
      TABLES
        table                   = lt_ibib "lt_ibib "Header data
      EXCEPTIONS
        end_of_object           = 1
        internal_error          = 2
        wrong_access_to_archive = 3
        OTHERS                  = 4.

ENDLOOP.

  However i am not getting any data from any tables like IBIB or IBIN, etc using the FM ARCHIVE_GET_TABLE. What am i doing wrong? 

  What i need to do to read the table data? 

  Please help!

Thanks

Gopal

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps: Inline Frame remove sandbox attribute
entry.content:
I found a solution for my use-case 🙂 

For everybody who is interessted, I did it by using an iframe and using pdf.js to render the pdf by myself: https://github.com/mozilla/pdf.js

Configuration in SAP Build Apps:

Use component inline frame:

  • set values in the sandbox field.
    • For my use case "allow-scripts" (needed to use javascript) is everything I need
  • In the srcdoc value you can paste your complete html file, which can also include a script to render the pdf

 

My html file:

<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/pdf.js/2.10.377/pdf.min.js"></script>
<html>
	<body>
		<div >
			<p style="max-width: fit-content; margin: auto;"></p>
			<canvas id="pdfCanvas" style="border-style: solid; border-width: 2px;"></canvas>
			<div style="max-width: fit-content; margin: auto; margin-top: 20px;">
				<button id="btnPrevious" style="width: 100px;">Previous</button>
				<button id="btnNext" style="width: 100px;">Next</button>
			</div>
		</div>
		<script>
			var pdf;
			var pageNr = 1;
			var maxPages = 0;
			var url= "<yourURL>/example.pdf";

			window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);

			function init() {
				document.getElementById('pdfCanvas').addEventListener('click', nextPage);
				document.getElementById('btnNext').addEventListener('click', nextPage);
				document.getElementById('btnPrevious').addEventListener('click', previousPage);
			}

			function nextPage() {
				if(pageNr >= maxPages) {
					throw new Error(`Reached end of pdf file (Site ${pageNr}/${maxPages})`);
				}
				else {
					pageNr++;
					renderPage(pdf);
				}
			}

			function previousPage() {
				if (pageNr == 1) {
					throw new Error(`Reached beginning of pdf file`);
				}
				else {
					pageNr--;
					renderPage(pdf);
				}
			}
			
			pdfjsLib.getDocument(url).promise.then((pdf) => {
				this.pdf = pdf;
				maxPages = pdf.numPages;

				console.log(maxPages);
				renderPage(pdf)
			});

			function renderPage(pdf) {
				pdf.getPage(pageNr).then((page) => {
					var scale = 1;
					var viewport = page.getViewport({ scale: scale });

					var canvas = document.getElementById('pdfCanvas');
					var context = canvas.getContext('2d');

					canvas.width = viewport.width;
					canvas.height = viewport.height;

					var renderContext = {
						canvasContext: context,
						viewport: viewport
					};
					page.render(renderContext);
				}).catch((err) => {
					console.log('ERROR: ' + err);
				});
			}
		</script>
	</body>
</html>

 The width/height can changed set by using the scale value.

It is also possible to create a pdf from base64. For that have a look here: https://mozilla.github.io/pdf.js/examples/#:~:text=Hello%20World%20using%20base64%20encoded%20PDF

Remove the blocked sales order which is already released from the documented credit decision list.

entry.title: Re: Process the DCD for released sales orders.
entry.content: Please refer the SAP KBA ##3101401 - Releasing the documented credit decision are not transferred.  https://me.sap.com/notes/3101401

entry.title: Re: Creating SPRO Node for Flight View Clusters in SAP
entry.content: Thank you @Khan-Muskan for sharing, very helpful

entry.title: Re: Custom Cards in Project Overview
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation doesn't offer the ability to create custom cards or reports. Instead, we offer a suite of pre-built cards and reports which have filtering options.

Your query is "how to create a report to show Open Tasks by Users". That data can be shown by accessing the Task Distribution child app of the Analytics app. The Analytics app can be accessed in the Implementation tab of SAP Cloud ALM. There are also other useful Task related child apps, like Task Trend Analysis.

Please note, these apps offer no export/output option for their graphics.. They are designed to be used as part of the project management workflow within SAP Cloud ALM itself. Currently if you need to extract a graphic from the apps to use elsewhere, you will need to take a screen shot. If you wish to request this functionality, please create a request in the SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation Customer Influence Campaign.

If you wish to use other tools/software to create custom dashboards or reports (e.g. SAP Analytics Cloud), SAP Cloud ALM offers several Pull APIs so that data can be extracted for this purpose. The full list of Pull APIs are documented in the API Guide for SAP Cloud ALM section API Reference. This includes a Task API.

Thanks and regards,
John

entry.title: Re: Metadata not updating after change in behavior projec...
entry.content:
Hi,

I thought this information could be useful for others in the future. The issue was in the solution was deactivating the metadata in SPRO in:

Navigation: ABAP Platform -> SAP Gateway -> OData Channel -> Administration -> Cache Settings -> Activate or Deactivate Cache in ABAP Platform -> SAP Gateway -> OData Channel -> Administration -> Cache Settings -> Activate or Deactivate cache

and deactivating the job /UI5/UPD_ODATA_METADATA_CACHE

entry.title: Re: Feature Control in RAP, Static Feature Control in RAP, Part - 1
entry.content: Thank you @Krishna_karale

entry.title: Re: Implementing 1SG – Group Reporting: Missing Clear Set...
entry.content:
Hi guys,

This is a complex and huge topic I have to say.

1SG is a complex process in FI and its logic are not easy to understand. If you are the first time to check this business, an consulting help in this area will be very helpful.

1. Is there a clear, structured document or guide on setting up 1SG from scratch and testing if it works correctly? A step-by-step explanation covering both configuration and validation would be extremely helpful. 

Sorry we have only TEST script in 1SG best practice. I don't have this even in SAP side. I want to get this guide like you ....to be honestly.

In SAP learning hub, if you search 1SG or Group reporting, consolidation, you will found some learning course, which will be helpful. Besides, you can check below links

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/performing-consolidation-with-sap-s-4hana-cloud-for-group-reporting

Performing Consolidation with SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Group reporting

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/introduce-sap-s-4hana-cloud-for-group-reporting

Of course , the most valid resource is our help portal Group Reporting | SAP Help Portal

2.  What is the correct sequence for setting up 1SG? There are multiple moving parts, like ACDOCA data extraction, ACDOCU mappings, eliminations, and reporting. Is there a defined process to follow?

I guess you want to know which task should be used in Data/Consolidation Monitor.  You can define this based on 1SG best practice. It's enough for most cases.  Of course, you can define it based on your demand.

 

3. How does the data flow from ACDOCA to ACDOCU in this process? What are the key configuration steps to ensure data is transferred correctly?

Release universal journal task in Data monitor app. 

You can check help for this information and we have a lot points about this area. I guess the key steps is about GRPL. Consolidation version and Consolidation Unit, FS item.

4. How are intercompany eliminations handled? For example, if Company A sells to Company B within the group, how does SAP ensure revenue is not double-counted in the consolidated financial statements?

This part is about Reclassification. You can check help for further.

5. Is it possible to renumber the SAP pre-delivered FS (Financial Statement) Items? If yes, what is the correct approach?

NO, you can change the setup for FS item and create your new FS item, but you cannot renumber pre-delivered FS item

6. Are there any additional KBAs, SAP Learning Hub materials, or best practices that provide better clarity on 1SG implementation?

I have provided some resources in above answers. Besides, you can found more in SAP Community other channel. 

We have some KBAs in SAP FOR Me and you can search them.

It's not easy to use Group Reporting and the information is very limited in Cloud product. We are trying to make it more rich and better but it's difficult. For on premise product side, we have similar structure, so you can check op resource if necessary. 

Hope this could help you solve the concern.

BR

Jerry

entry.title: UPDATE PAN ON VENDOR MASTER DATA
entry.content:
We are using API to create business partner 'API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartner' in the role of supplier fin-accounting . 

The field J_1IPANNO is not available on the API. 

As the integration is flowing online , how can we update this field in the supplier vendor master data on the tab Supplier : country -specific enhancement 

is there any badi, enhancement for public cloud ? 

Thanks 

Ana

entry.title: Re: Failed to commit objects to server : Undefined Info S...
entry.content:
the problem occures when "NLS_CHARACTERSET" and 'NLS_NCHAR_CHARACTERSET' for your CMS DB are set to other than AL16UTF16 or AL32UTF8.

So you should check the CMS -DB for which "NLS_CHARACTERSET" and 'NLS_NCHAR_CHARACTERSET' are supported

see KBA 3437779 - Failed to commit objects to server : Undefined Info Store error while creating Users/Groups, issues with all authentication methods (WinAD, LDAP, SAP) BI 4.3SP04

entry.title: Re: Central User Administration(CUA) Configuration
entry.content:
Caution: this (otherwise very good blog) blog shows the old template roles roles (which I guess still work).

However, nowadays you should use these roles instead (and never ever, think about using SAP_ALL):
Note 2000585 - CUA: Assigning minimal authorizations for communications users (version 2)
SAP Note, Version: 9, Released On: 04.01.2024
https://me.sap.com/notes/2000585

entry.title: Re: 2502 C4C Release Discussion
entry.content: And do you have the same release briefing content of SAP Sales and Service Cloud (aka Cloud for Customer) for the 2502 (February 2025) release for Version 2 ?

entry.title: Is There an SAP S/4HANA Service Certification Available?
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I’ve been searching for an SAP S/4HANA Service certification but haven’t found any information about it being offered by SAP. So far, I’ve only found certifications for SAP Service Cloud and SAP FSM. Does anyone know if SAP plans to introduce an S/4HANA Service certification in the future? If it already exists, could you please share the link to the certification?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: The user wants a warning popup message to appear afte...
entry.content:
Hello,

You can try the following 2 things.

1. **Custom Logic App**: In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, you can use the Custom Logic app. This app provides you with a platform to implement custom BAdI logic.

2. **Flexible Billing Document Cancellation BAdI**: You may use the `SD_BIL_FLEX_CANCELLATION` BAdI to implement custom validation logic which can potentially trigger messages based on certain conditions if applicable to your requirement. You should investigate if checking this field's value fits into the scope of this BAdI.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: Outbound EDI Customer Invoice SupplierPartyID inconsi...
entry.content:
Hello,

It seems like the issue you're facing is related to incorrect mapping of the business partner IDs in the "Customer Invoice - Send (B2B)" API. The problem lies in the fact that the "SupplierPartyID" for all the different PartyTypes, including "BillFrom", is being populated with the customer's ID ("CUSTFR1") instead of the company's ID (which should be "FR10" for "BillFrom").

Here's a checklist of actions that can help resolve this issue:

1. **Mapping Configuration**: Ensure that your mapping configuration in the middleware or the integration tool (such as SAP Process Integration/Orchestration, SAP Integration Suite, or any other integration platform) is correctly set up. The configuration should map the correct business partner IDs for each PartyType. Specifically, the "BillFrom" PartyType should map to the company's ID ("FR10").

2. **Master Data Alignment**: Verify that the business partner master data is correctly maintained in your SAP S/4HANA Cloud system. The IDs for Sold-to, Bill-to, Payer, and Supplier should be accurate and aligned with your configuration in the middleware.

3. **API Configuration**: Double-check the configuration settings of the "Customer Invoice - Send (B2B)" API. Make sure that the API is correctly set up to fetch and assign the appropriate business partner IDs based on the roles they are serving in the transaction.

4. **Integration Flow Debugging**: If possible, debug the integration flow to see where the mapping might be going wrong. Check for transformation logic that might inadvertently set the wrong values.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: BTP Destinations and SAP Build Apps to integrate SAP C4C & S/4HANA
entry.content:
I have added all the required details but this is not showing status 200. 

ex this is my service url 

What to add 

xxxxxxxxx.abap-web.us10.hana.ondemand.com/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZSB_HEADER_U/

or

XXXXXweb.us10.hana.ondemand.com/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZSB_HEADER_U/?sap-client=100

although both are same and valid.

i have added basic auth in which i have added my trial acc mail and password.

entry.title: Re: getting Adobe Form error CX_FP_RUNTIME_SYSTEM
entry.content:
In my case program FP_TEST_00 helped to get more details about the error. 

We had this issue because the SID (system ID) was changed few weeks ago and destination for Adobe forms was wrong, there was no destination for a new System ID. New destination has been created and we resolved the issue.

entry.content:
Hello All,

we have a cloud connector, and configured Email configuration. But whenever it triggers a alert some of the users are receiving alerts and some of the users are not receiving alerts. If any one has idea how to fix the issue kindly help me.

The cloud connector version is 2.17.2

Thanks

Veeresh

entry.title: but why its not updating in standard table by staging table?
When Fiori APP for Goods receipt will be developed
entry.content: Is there any plan by SAP to create NEW standard Fiori APP for Goods Receipt instead of MIGO

entry.title: Re: How to use I_ProductTP_2 in mock-framework?
entry.content:
Okay, I understand that so far, thankyou.

It feels strange though, that in the CDS test environment the provisioning of data to run your tests upon goes by the type of the underlying database table, which feels pretty contradictory.

Yet what I was actually trying get under test is this (and I need mocked data for that):

I have a more or less complex business logic that amongst other things reads data from I_Product and changes data (somewhere else) through I_ProductTP_2. How am I supposed to do this in a consistent way, especially regarding the fact that EML is very easy to be gotten wrong, so I can't just "mock it away", because in 9 out of 10 cases my test will fail in the EML - testing against some fake thing won't help me there, I'd want to test the EML's result on the mocked data throughout the whole thing. And my expectation would have been that mocking data into, say, I_Product through the SQL-Test-Environment would affect the whole test as if it were written on the DB (so all Entities get the same data etc.) - and CDS-Test-Environment does exactly that, though maybe in a strange way - but well it doesn't. How would I ever get complex logic under test this way? How would I ever know if the data I am writing can be handled correctly by some other code that I may not even have under my control?

entry.title: Re: Datasphere : Text association to analytical model
entry.content:
I was getting the same error but i was able to fix using 2 steps

1.if you go to the view property pane >attribute >click the pencil icon and add a text column for one of the field which has a text usually description of the key field.

2.click on the edit compound key option(double key icon) and add the column for which you wish to add text association as representative key.

i hope it helps!

entry.title: Re: How to filter a bar graph by dimensions from the drop...
entry.content:
This is a very basic example -
*you can enhance the functionality by adding a dimension selector, or automatically taking the dimension 
 currently present in the chart etc.

In this example we use the Best Run Juice sample model, with a chart containing the Sales Manager dimension.

Widgets:
Chart:  Chart_1
Dropdown: Dropdown_1

Steps:

1. Page OnInitialisation event add the script:

Dropdown_1.addItem("All Managers");
var Managers = Chart_1.getDataSource().getMembers("Sales_Manager");
for(var i=0;i<Managers.length;i++)
{Dropdown_1.addItem(Managers[i].id,Managers[i].description);}
Dropdown_1.setSelectedKey("All Managers");

2. In the Dropdown add the script:
var Dropdown_value=this.getSelectedKey();
Chart_1.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Sales_Manager");
if(Dropdown_value !=='All Managers')
{Chart_1.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Sales_Manager",Dropdown_value);}

The end result is this

entry.title: YBPH Profit Center group does not exist
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I encountered an issue in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud regarding the profit center standard hierarchy. The standard hierarchy node YBPH has been created, but no corresponding profit center group exists.

I expected the system to generate a profit center group automatically when the standard hierarchy node was created. Has anyone else experienced this? Is there a specific configuration or process that needs to be followed to ensure the profit center group is created?

Any insights would be greatly appreciated.

2 screenshot attached from  Define Profit Center Standard Hierarchy in Controlling (CBC) and Manage Profit Center Groups (FIORI)

Context: Profit Center Migration to the customizing tenant

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: How to filter a bar graph by dimensions from the drop...
entry.content: @JBARLOW , Thank you for your response. But the requirement is to filter by dimension not by dimension members. For example, if there are three dimensions in the model. Brand, Region and Company Code. I want a dropdown which filters the values based on the dimension selected by the users. What I understood from your response is that you are filtering on list of dimension member instead of entire dimension. I would appreciate if you can tell me how can I enhance the dimension selection option.

entry.title: SAP Fiori launchpad: Hiding empty spaces and pages
entry.content:
What is this feature about?

Overview

Hiding empty spaces and pages is a new feature of SAP Fiori launchpad.

Essentially, this means that empty spaces and pages are removed from the space menu and are no longer shown in the App Finder.

To be more precise, if pages or spaces are empty—meaning they don’t contain any (1) role-based content or (2) device-type-based content—then it makes no sense to expose them. In such cases, it would serve no purpose for users to access them.

Benefits

The key benefit of this approach is that it enhances the user experience by preventing end users from encountering empty content.

Additionally, this feature gives administrators greater flexibility. They can organize content without worrying about creating empty pages or spaces since such pages will automatically be hidden from end users.

Limitation

End user personalization is not considered, mainly to optimize performance.

If a page is empty and users personalized it while the feature is disabled, enabling the feature later will cause that page to disappear, as only the original content defined by the administrators is considered.

Similarly, if users remove all tiles from a page through personalization, making it empty, the page won’t be hidden because it became empty due to user actions.

 

How to enable this feature?

As an administrator, it is possible to enable or disable the display of empty spaces and pages by toggling the parameter ‘SPACES_HIDE_EMPTY_SPACES_PAGES’ using the 'Manage Launchpad Settings' application.

  • If the toggle is ON, the space menu should hide any empty spaces and pages.
  • If the toggle is OFF, the space menu shows all spaces and pages, regardless of their content. 

 

 

To enable or disable this setting, users must Edit and Save it. The changes to this configuration will take effect only after a refresh.

NOTE

  • This feature is available with S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502, Integrated Business Planning 2502 & BTP ABAP environment / Steampunk 2502.
  • This feature will be offered as opt-in in this initial release, i.e. disabled by default.
  • This feature is also planned to be delivered with S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2025 (on-premise).

thank you in advance for the advices,

BR,

Julia

entry.title: Re: Tracking of CO2 emissions in SAP
entry.content:
Hello All,

Seems like I have similar challenge here.

I am currently looking for simple solution - as I have already CO2 emission calculated.  - any hints which field in material master I could use to store data of kg of CO2 generated?

We would like to srore Co2 emission in one most peferably global field where fixed value of calculated emision per 1kg of the product will be stored. We have it supported by another tool, moreover in many cases we have them provided from suppliers.

I have tried to change label of dield in MARA, that we will never ue, but it is not possible for SAP default tables. I would also like to avoid creating custom field in existing data model.

thank you in advance for the advises,

BR,

Julia

entry.title: Re: Filter Value help results in Child entity based on pa...
entry.content: I am not certain how this may have turned out for odata v2 to be honest. If you're happy to connect on google meet or something, we could take a look. Consumption.derivation sadly didn't work for me. but to be fair i didn't try too hard on that front to see if it worked.

entry.title: Re: Get the contracts list whose value is greater than 1...
entry.content:
This is a copy/paste for a post I wrote ages ago - so apologies if the context is not spot on,
but it will meet your requirement:
It includes additional code to set button colours etc - so you could ignore that part.

Filtering measure values – conditional e.g. greater or less than


This approach can be used if you need to filter using buttons or radio buttons, you could of course just use the native input controls.

// this is just used to change the button css class
ACTIVE.setCssClass('boff');
ACTIVE=this;
ACTIVE.setCssClass('bon');
// end button css class:  Script Var ACTIVE is defined as type button

 

Table_2.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("Region");
var arr = Table_2.getDataSource().getResultSet();
var dimension_members = ArrayUtils.create(Type.string);

// push dimension member to array if measure value meets the condtion, e.g. >10000000
// You obviously need to adjust the code for each button / radio button value --- 

for (var i=0;i<arr.length;i++)
                  {   var string = arr[i][Alias.MeasureDimension].rawValue;    
                       var number = ConvertUtils.stringToNumber(string);         
                       if(number>10000000)   {dimension_members.push(arr[i]["Region"].id);                                                                                                                         }   }        

// filter the table with the dimension ids present in the array
Table_2.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Region",dimension_members);

// just used to set the Radio button key to match the button clicked
RBG.setSelectedKey('> 10 Mil');

entry.title: [R] not possible to upload migration templates via migration cockpit app
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I tried to upload the migration template via migration cockpit app in the sap test system and then i get error message "A system maintenance event is in process. Please try again later. " please check attached screenshot(systemerror)

 

Could you please tell us what's the reason and downtime? when should we have access to upload the file again?

 

Currently we are in the cutover phase and we have to upload the templates to test system first in order to proceed with productive system later.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Boosting performance in SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) applications with cds-cach
entry.content: Interesting! Thanks for sharing

entry.title: Re: [R] not possible to upload migration templates via mi...
entry.content:
Hello Team,

The Upgrade process has just begun in your system and during this period migration objects are locked for the upgrade. You can resume the services once we release the locks for the migration objects (mostly over the weekend)

You can check the below KBA.
https://me.sap.com/notes/2996675

entry.title: Re: attach documents to invoices with DMS
entry.content: could you please explain how you solved it

entry.title: Error message J1B_NFE032 in MIRO
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

We have a process in which the supplier uses an alphanumeric code as the Invoice number (for example, "D0DBCD"). Therefore, it is not possible to enter the invoice using the MIRO T-Code because the "Reference" field (RBKP-XBLNR) does not accept characters other than numbers. When we try, we receive the error message J1B_NFE032 (Doc. No. can only contain digits; document number D0DBCD contains other characters).


Could you please tell me if there is an EXIT or way that we can use to make it possible to enter alphanumeric values ​​for a specific type of Invoice? We need XBLNR field accepts alphanumeric characters and consequently migrate to the Invoice (J_1BNFDOC-NFNUM).

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Does the SAP Enable Now Certification will be retired...
entry.content:
Hi @Abel4 
The the SAP CERTIFICATION C_SEN SAP Certified Associate - SAP Enable Now will retire soon.
Everybody certified will receive one last validity of 12 month.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: YBPH Profit Center group does not exist
entry.content: Check this answer of Javier_del-Peso.

entry.title: Storage location to Storage location with same plant using STO scheduling agreement in ePPDS
entry.content:
Hello All,

Thanks in Advance.

We have a scenario, where we are planning to do internal procurement from storage location within the same plant using storage location to storage location STO scheduling agreement. 

To main reason to have a scheduling agreement is to send JIT and FRC release to our warehouse location, which is maintained as a storage location within same plant.

We will have seperate storage location MRP areas for both storage location, and we wish to plan it via embedded PPDS. Our STO scheduling agreement when CIFed from S4HANA is stuck with a queue error "Both source and destination locations are same".

I understand that this response it because both receiving and issuing plant is same. But I am doubtful why PP-DS is not considering storage location MRP areas, which is also maintained as locations in PP-DS.

When a case was raised to SAP, contraticting response was given for two cases. one said it is not possible, the other sugguested a BADI implementation : BAdI /SAPAPO/CIF_LOC_INBOUND or /SAPAPO/CIF_PO_INBOUND

I need to know whether ePPDS is capable of acheiving this process. if not we have to either use MRP live or go on to maintaining the external warehosue as plant.

So PP-DS experts please confirm is PP-DS can perform this function or if there's a work aroud?

SCM APO Production Planning and Detailed Scheduling (PP/DS)  MM (Materials Management)

entry.title: Re: Work Schedule Upload
entry.content: Hi, if you are tying to assign existing work schedules to employees then you need to use 'Import Employee Data' with 'Job History' template'

entry.title: Re: Course Survey ins LMS
entry.content:
do you have the Purge Optional overdue course feedback surveys active?

this deletes the surveys that are optional and untouched by the user.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Public Cloud outbound SOAP call SalesOrderBul...
entry.content: MAy i know what is the User name for outbound you are using?

entry.title: Re: Problems using Eclipse 2024-06 (4.32.0) Build id: 202...
entry.content: You can install the "HANA Administration" plugin to your Eclipse, so you don't need an additional HANA Studio. This can be done from the repository https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/2024-09

entry.title: Issues with PDF Documents Containing Images or URLs in SAP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am encountering a persistent issue when working with PDF documents in SAP, and I would appreciate any insights or solutions you might have.

Situation: I have been using the transaction CG3Z to upload PDF documents to the SAP server. After obtaining the document's information in a binary table (type BAPICONTEN = RAW 1022), I attempt to upload this information to a document using the function module SRM_DOCUMENT_CHECKIN_VIA_TAB. The document appears to be generated correctly. However, when I try to open it using the function module SRM_DOCUMENT_DISPLAY, I encounter a read error.

Observations:

  • PDFs containing only text can be viewed correctly without any issues.
  • If the PDF contains images, the document appears blank when opened.
  • I have also tested with other documents containing images, hyperlinks, etc., and I encounter the same read error.
  • If a local document is used instead of one from the SAP server, it works correctly regardless of the elements within the document (images, hyperlinks, etc.).

entry.title: Re: Dashboard Design - Science & Standards, Not Random Charts & Art. (Part One)
entry.content:

IBCS I kind of get, as companies want to follow corporate design guidelines.

Do you know how to handle this situation ?

Thank you 
Mourad

entry.title: Re: discount rows in telco accelerator
entry.content: Yes, you are right. It seems that a Price Alteration is required when creating a discount. Even if you choose to apply a discount via a Promotion, you still need to select an alteration. However, in the Sample Use Cases section of the documentation, one of the alterations is defined for the Pay Now option. Shouldn't this option meet your requirement?

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors LMS Training Planner: Let’s Explore & Configure!
entry.content:
Hi Nagesh (@nageshpolu),

Good explanation of the Training Planner feature

I have a query, if we plan to use only the training planner to plan and budgeting of the trainings, how can we stop users (including Supervisors) to directly assign themselves those trainings from the Catalogs and force them to use only Training Planner for adding the trainings for assignments. Although "Add to Learning Plan" permission can be removed from user roles, however, it will impact the free of cost and online trainings as well that are available in the Catalogs that do not require any planning. Any standard solution to this problem?

I have an workaround in mind to apply an ad hoc workflow to such trainings, that are required to be assigned through training planner only, which is never approved when trainings are added from Catalogs directly. However, I am yet to test that workaround and don't know if any workflow added to trainings will also be applicable for Training Planner assignments too(?), but looking for a standard solution to this.

Thanks,

Sandeep

entry.title: Re: Replikation aus dem WM ans ERP
entry.content: Hi Dominik, Thank you very much for your response. It was very helpful. Now I'm facing the next Problem. The IDoc is now being sent to the ERP and processed there as well. The header data, such as gross weight, is also adjusted accordingly in the ERP when I change the delivery quantity. Unfortunately, the field LIPS-LFIMG in the item itself is not updated. Do you know a solution for that. Best regards Thomas

entry.title: Re: My app can not export PDF anymore after Windows 11 up...
entry.content:
Unfortunately CR 11 is VERY old and you should have updated to CR 11.5, but it too is no longer available.

Of course none of what you are using is supported by Windows either.

All I can suggest is upgrading to Visual Studio 2010->2022 and use the CR .NET components:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

It's likely either permission or a dependency missing. You'll have to do more debugging...

Do all exports fail or some?
